props.name: label
props.description: Accessible name for the region landmark. Defaults to the i18n catalog's "Notices".

props.name: maxVisible
props.description: Maximum notices rendered at once. `0` means no limit.

props.name: inset
props.description: Distance from the viewport edges, as a CSS length. Default `1rem`.

props.name: exitDuration
props.description: Leave duration in ms. Defaults to 1.75× `duration` — a gentler exit.

props.name: easing
props.description: Easing for enter/reflow. Ease-out by default.

props.name: exitEasing
props.description: Easing for the leave animation. Ease-in by default: starts slow and accelerates away, so a dismissal never snaps.
